definition: optical photometer that uses a light source operating in the IR spectral region that overlaps with the absorption region of the gas of interest in order to measure its concentration

definition_ml.en: optical photometer that uses a light source operating in the IR spectral region that overlaps with the absorption region of the gas of interest in order to measure its concentration
definition_ml.de: Optisches Absorptionsphotometer, das eine Lichtquelle verwendet, die im IR-Spektralbereich arbeitet, der sich mit dem Absorptionsbereich des interessierenden Gases überschneidet, um dessen Konzentration zu messen

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
